channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Quarterly HVAC Shutdown Scheduled for Cogswell, Polymer, and MRC
item.description: A planned quarterly HVAC maintenance shutdown will take place on Wednesday, July 1, from 7:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m., affecting the supply and exhaust systems in Cogswell Laboratory, the Polymer Center, and The Materials Research Center (MRC). Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Libraries announce a change to Ebook Central downloads – farewell to Adobe Digital Editions
item.description:
During the week of July 13, the new Ebook Central Reader App will replace Adobe Digital Editions as the primary offline reading solution for full downloads of Ebook Central ebooks. The new Ebook Central Reader App is a dedicated mobile and desktop app offering a more streamlined, secure, and accessible experience. The app, available on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android, supports EPUB and PDF formats and allows users to manage their loans and devices. Learn More…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
